'''shadhowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oestruation|oestruation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oestruation|oestruation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shadhowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædheweth|shædheweth]] || [[word:shædhewej|shædhewej]] || [[word:shædhewesh|shædhewesh]] || [[word:shædhewe|shædhewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhodhowoth|shadhodhowoth]] || [[word:shadhodhowoj|shadhodhowoj]] || [[word:shadhodhowosh|shadhodhowosh]] || [[word:shadhodhowo|shadhodhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhowoth|shadhowoth]] || [[word:shadhowoj|shadhowoj]] || [[word:shadhowosh|shadhowosh]] || [[word:shadhowo|shadhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhofwofth|shadhofwofth]] || [[word:shadhofwofj|shadhofwofj]] || [[word:shadhofwofsh|shadhofwofsh]] || [[word:shadhofwof|shadhofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadhowotho|shadhowotho]] || [[word:shadhowojo|shadhowojo]] || [[word:shadhowosho|shadhowosho]] || [[word:shadhowoko|shadhowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadhowoth|shadhowoth]] || [[word:shadhowoj|shadhowoj]] || [[word:shadhowosh|shadhowosh]] || [[word:shadhowo|shadhowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadhowothol|shadhowothol]] || [[word:shadhowojol|shadhowojol]] || [[word:shadhowoshol|shadhowoshol]] || [[word:shadhowokol|shadhowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadhowoothotho|shadhowoothotho]] || [[word:shadhowoojojo|shadhowoojojo]] || [[word:shadhowooshosho|shadhowooshosho]] || [[word:shadhowooko|shadhowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadhowothon|shadhowothon]] || [[word:shadhowojon|shadhowojon]] || [[word:shadhowoshon|shadhowoshon]] || [[word:shadhowokon|shadhowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadhowothooro|shadhowothooro]] || [[word:shadhowojooro|shadhowojooro]] || [[word:shadhowoshooro|shadhowoshooro]] || [[word:shadhowokooro|shadhowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
